Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deconstruct the Process Description I need to break down the provided text into distinct phases steps to identify areas for questioning

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Phase 1 Initiation Documentation Landlord contacts regional office Property coordinator reviews docs deeds certs inspections Requests updates if missing Records details in DB Phase 2 Manager Assignment Assign dedicated property manager based on workload geography experience track record Intro call meeting to align expectations pets maintenance payments Phase 3 Physical Prep Marketing Manager schedules photographer inspector Inspector report Issues Manager works with landlord to fix Pass inspection Digital marketing team creates listings brochures updates pricing models Phase 4 Activation Leasing Property activated in portal Manager Leasing agent handles screening apps credit employment refs Multiple tenants Negotiate terms discounts prioritize Finalize lease collect deposit schedule move in Phase 5 Post Lease Checks Lifecycle Compliance officer reviews lease fair housing Financial analyst verifies pricing strategy IT checks integration Exceptions mentioned special insurance custom clauses Communication tracking email CRM PM tools

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Brainstorm Questions per Category I need to generate questions that target missing details decision criteria roles timing and exceptions

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Initiation Docs Decision Criteria How does the coordinator decide whats missing vs outdated Is there a checklist Roles Who is the regional office Is it a person or a department Timing How long does doc review take Exceptions What if a deed is disputed What if a certificate cant be obtained Data What specific fields are recorded Source of expected rental price range

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Manager Assignment Decision Criteria How is workload measured Is there a threshold How is geographic specialization defined Roles Is the manager assigned automatically or manually Exceptions What if no manager fits the criteria

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Intro Call Roles Who organizes this Manager or Coordinator Timing How soon after assignment Output Is the outcome documented Does it change the contract

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Physical Prep Marketing Roles Manager schedules vs Digital marketing team creates Handoff Decision Criteria Passes inspection what is the pass criteria Who decides repairs Timing How long for photos inspections How long for marketing creation Pricing Updates internal pricing models based on market trends who does this How often Exceptions What if the landlord refuses repairs

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Activation Leasing Decision Criteria Activated what triggers this After marketing After inspection Roles Manager or Leasing agent distinction Screening Specific criteria for credit employment Automated or manual Decision Criteria Multiple tenants how is the winner chosen Scorecard Timing How long is the screening period Exceptions Denied tenants What happens to their data

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Post Lease Lifecycle Roles Compliance Financial Analyst IT when do they Before or after lease signed Timing Throughout the lifecycle is this real time or batch Exceptions Special insurance how is this triggered Custom lease clauses approval workflow Data IT checks integration automated or manual check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Structure and Refine Questions Group the questions logically to make the interview flow well Good categories might be Process Initiation Documentation Property Manager Assignment Onboarding Inspection Repairs Marketing Tenant Screening Leasing Compliance Financials System Integration Exception Handling Governance Metrics Continuous Improvement Optional but good for improving understanding

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Drafting Questions Mental Check against constraints No SQL no implementation details open ended conceptual

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review and Polish Ensure the tone is professional and inquisitive Make sure questions are truly open ended Avoid Yes No questions

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Refinement Instead of Is the inspector external ask What is the composition of the inspector resource pool and how does that influence the inspection timeline Refinement Instead of Who approves discounts ask What is the approval workflow for lease concessions or promotional discounts Refinement Add questions about handoffs How is the handoff managed between the coordinator and the property manager

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Final Output Construction Organize the questions by theme Add a brief intro and perhaps a summary of what the questions aim to achieve

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Themes Documentation Data Integrity Resource Allocation Manager Assignment Physical Validation Repair Management Marketing Pricing Activation Tenant Acquisition Negotiation Quality Assurance Compliance Financial Controls Exception Handling Edge Cases Process Governance Communication

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Sample Questions per Theme Docs What constitutes a showstopper in documentation vs a fixable gap Assignment How does the system balance geographic specialization against workload Repairs What is the threshold for minor vs major repairs and does that trigger different workflows Pricing How frequently are pricing models updated and does the listing reflect real time changes Leasing What are the primary weighting factors in the tenant selection decision Compliance Is the compliance review a gatekeeper step or a retrospective audit Exceptions How are custom lease clauses routed for legal review

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Polish Mental Representation of Output List questions clearly Ensure variety some about roles some about timing some about decisions Check against No SQL Implementation Questions like How is data stored are bad Questions like How is data validated are good Questions like What is the source of truth are good
